description: You are a freelance wedding videographer assembling a highlight reel from raw footage in /home/ga/Videos/wedding_raw/. Several clips have orientation issues detailed in the camera log at /home/ga/Documents/camera_log.txt. Correct the orientation of all 6 clips to a 1280x720 landscape resolution, removing any rotation metadata, and save them to /home/ga/Videos/corrected/ using their original filenames. Create a single highlight reel at /home/ga/Videos/wedding_highlight.mp4 (1280x720, H.264, with audio) by concatenating the 6 corrected clips in numerical order. Document the work in a JSON shot correction log at /home/ga/Documents/shot_correction_log.json containing 6 entries with the keys: 'filename', 'original_resolution', 'issue', 'correction', and 'output_resolution'.
